iterate_target: Leaderboard walk-forward champion on ETH/4h: supertrend_tail_harvester_8to1 (QScore 4.47, PF 1.921, DD 10.9, 85 trades)
next_cycle_focus: Backtest the same Cycle 150 ETH / 4h exploit batch against the tail-harvester champion baseline and compare whether drawdown improves most through light VWAP value acceptance, cleaner trend-state context, or faster post-entry invalidation while preserving the broad champion trade-density profile.
rationale: This run keeps the exact ordered cycle_id from cycle_orders.json at 150 and does not increment it. The full compliant exploit batch remains the same three focused ETH / 4h supertrend tail-harvester variants already written for this cycle: a drawdown-trim branch, a cleaner trend-state branch, and a faster-invalidation branch. Asset, timeframe, and family stay fixed to the ordered champion lineage, and abandoned_families remains empty in the live execution record.
